quranicRelevance: Swearing oaths (Qasam), dividing resources/livelihood ('qasamna baynahum'), and mutual division.

keyDerivations.meaning: To swear, make an oath, or vow
To divide, distribute, apportion, or share
To swear mutually, or divide among themselves

figurativeOrRareUsages: قَسَمْنَا بَيْنَهُمْ مَعِيشَتَهُمْ (43:32): We distributed/apportioned among them their livelihood.
لَا أُقْسِمُ: I swear (emphatic formula, literally 'I do not swear [because the matter is too obvious]').
discardedNoise: Detailed legal disputes on oath validation.
summaryEn: The root covers oaths and distribution, joining the solemn pledges of creation (Qasam) with the divine distribution of sustenance (Qismah).
summaryAr: يغطي هذا الجذر الأيمان والقسمة، جامعاً بين القسم واليمين المغلظة (قسم) والتوزيع والتقدير الإلهي للأرزاق (قسمنا).
rawText: أَقْسَمَ عَلَيْهِ 4 He conjured him; he said بِحَقِّكَ. (Mgh, art. طمر.) اِسْتَقْسَمَ 10 He sought to know what was allotted to him, by means of the أَزْلَام, (S, * Mgh, and Har, p. 465,) and what was not allotted to him. (Mgh, Har.) اِنْقَسَمَ الَى أَقْسَامٍ كَثِيرَةٍ 7 It was divided into many parts. تَقَسَّمَ 5 It (a thing) was, or became, divided, or distributed. (MA.) See an ex. in a verse, voce شَتَّانَ. قَاسَمَهُ الشَّىْءَ 3 He divided with him the thing, each of them allotting to himself his share, or portion. === قَاسَمَهُ بِٱللّٰهِ He swore to him by God. قَسَمٌ A conjurement. See أَقْسَمَ عَلَيْهِ. === An oath (S, Msb, K) by God [&c.]. (Msb, K.) An asseveration. === وَاوُ القَسَمِ The و denoting an oath. قَسَمَ 1 and 🡻قَسَّمَ He divided; parted; divided in parts or shares; distributed. === قَسَمَ أَمْرَهُ, or 🡻قَسَّمَهُ: see 3 in art. عدل. قَسَّامٌ An officer of the Kádee, who divides inheritances. قَسَّمَ 2 see 1. قِسْمٌ A division: (Msb:) and particularly (Msb) a portion, or share. (S, Msb, K.) Pl. أَقْسَامٌ. === لَيْسَ مِنْ أَقْساَمِ كَذَا It is not a part of such a thing; it does not belong, or appertain, to such a thing; it is independent of such a thing. قِسْمَةٌ is also used in the sense of مَقْسُومٌ [meaning A thing, or collection of things, divided into portions, or shares]: (Bd and Jel in liv. 28:) a portion, or share; like قِسْمٌ: (Msb:) [and portions, or shares; as in the phrase,] نُخْرِجُ طَرِيقًا مِنْ بَيْنِ قِسْمَةِ الأَرْضِ أَوِ الدَّارِ [We will exclude a way, or passage, from among the portions, or shares, of the land, or the house]. (Mgh in art. رفع.)
